summary: Design tenant configuration schema and validation rules
description: Define comprehensive JSON schema for tenant configuration covering deployment type, resource limits, feature flags, database connections, and security policies. Build validation engine that ensures configuration consistency and detects conflicts before provisioning.
resolution_details: Created JSON Schema v7 definition with 45 configuration parameters. Implemented validation engine using jsonschema library with custom validators for Azure resource limits and naming constraints. Added pre-flight checks for namespace availability and resource quota verification. Schema tested with 30+ valid and invalid configuration samples.

summary: Build tenant provisioning API and Helm chart generator
description: Implement REST API endpoints for tenant provisioning operations (create, update, delete). Build Helm chart template generator that produces tenant-specific chart values based on configuration schema. Integrate with Kubernetes API for namespace and resource creation.
resolution_details: Implemented /v1/tenants provisioning API with full CRUD operations. Built Jinja2-based Helm chart generator producing values.yaml for each deployment type. Added Kubernetes client integration for automated namespace creation with resource quotas and network policies. API load tested with 50 concurrent provisioning requests.

summary: Create distributed feature flag storage with Redis
description: Implement Redis-based feature flag storage with pub/sub mechanism for real-time flag updates across all application pods. Design flag data model supporting boolean flags, percentage rollouts, and tenant-specific overrides. Add cache invalidation strategy for configuration changes.
resolution_details: Built feature flag service using Redis Cluster with 3-node configuration for high availability. Implemented pub/sub channels for instant flag propagation (<100ms cross-pod latency). Created flag data model with inheritance hierarchy (global → feature-group → tenant-specific). Added Lua scripts for atomic flag operations. Benchmarked at 50k flag evaluations/second per pod.

summary: Build admin UI for feature flag management
description: Create web-based admin interface for feature flag CRUD operations with search, filtering, and bulk operations. Implement real-time preview showing which tenants are affected by flag changes. Add rollback capability to restore previous flag states.
resolution_details: Built React-based admin UI with Material-UI components. Implemented real-time tenant impact analysis showing affected tenant count before flag activation. Added flag change history with one-click rollback. Integrated with RBAC system requiring admin role for flag modifications. UI tested across Chrome, Firefox, Safari with full accessibility compliance.

summary: Build brand asset upload service with CDN integration
description: Implement asset upload API supporting logos, favicons, and background images with automatic image optimization and format conversion. Integrate with Azure CDN for global content delivery with edge caching.
resolution_details: Built asset upload service with image validation (max 5MB, supported formats: PNG, JPG, SVG). Implemented automatic optimization using Sharp library reducing file sizes by 60% on average. Integrated Azure Blob Storage with CDN endpoint configuration. Added image versioning with cache invalidation on updates. Supports multi-resolution asset generation for responsive designs.

summary: Create dynamic theme engine and email template editor
description: Build theme engine that applies tenant-specific CSS variables at runtime for colors, fonts, and spacing. Create WYSIWYG email template editor with variable substitution for transactional emails.
resolution_details: Implemented CSS-in-JS theme engine with runtime variable injection using styled-components. Built email template editor using React-Email with live preview. Added variable picker for dynamic content (tenant name, user name, subscription details). Templates compiled to responsive HTML with inline CSS for email client compatibility. Tested across 15 email clients including Outlook, Gmail, Apple Mail.

description: Integrate Azure Key Vault for per-tenant encryption key storage and rotation. Implement data encryption at rest using AES-256 with tenant-specific keys. Add automated key rotation policies with zero-downtime re-encryption.
resolution_details: Built key management service integrating Azure Key Vault with automated key provisioning per tenant. Implemented transparent data encryption for sensitive fields (payment methods, PII) using envelope encryption pattern. Added background job for key rotation with incremental re-encryption. Keys rotated automatically every 90 days. Encryption performance overhead measured at <3% on database operations.

summary: Build data residency router and compliance reporting
description: Implement data residency configuration supporting EU, US, UK, APAC, and Canada regions. Build routing logic that ensures tenant data stays within configured geographic boundaries. Create automated compliance reports for GDPR, SOC2, and data export requests.
resolution_details: Built geo-routing middleware that directs tenant requests to region-specific database clusters based on tenant configuration. Implemented GDPR data export generating complete tenant data dump in structured JSON format. Added data deletion workflow with cascade logic covering all related records. Created compliance dashboard showing data residency status and audit logs. Successfully completed SOC2 Type II audit with zero findings.

summary: Integrate Azure OpenAI for recommendation generation
description: Set up Azure OpenAI service integration with GPT-4 model for generating natural language upgrade recommendations. Design prompt engineering framework that incorporates tenant profile, release content, and historical context. Implement response parsing and validation.
resolution_details: Configured Azure OpenAI endpoint with GPT-4 deployment in East US region. Built prompt template system with structured JSON output mode for recommendation extraction. Implemented function calling for structured decision outputs (MUST/SHOULD/CAN SKIP). Added retry logic with exponential backoff for API resilience. Response latency averaged 2.3 seconds for complete recommendation generation.

summary: Build Qdrant vector database for RAG implementation
description: Deploy Qdrant vector database for storing Jira ticket embeddings. Implement embedding generation using text-embedding-3-small model. Build semantic search functionality for retrieving relevant tickets based on tenant feature usage.
resolution_details: Deployed Qdrant cluster on Azure Kubernetes with persistent storage and snapshot backups. Implemented embedding pipeline processing 324 Jira tickets with 1536-dimension vectors. Built semantic search with hybrid scoring combining vector similarity and feature ID exact matching. Added index optimization reducing search latency to <50ms for top-10 results. Collection indexed with cosine similarity metric achieving 0.92 average relevance score.

summary: Create GitHub integration for automated PR generation
description: Build GitHub API integration that automatically creates pull requests in Helm repository after human operator approval. PR should include updated values.yaml with new version and generated commit message with upgrade reasoning.
resolution_details: Implemented GitHub App authentication with repository write permissions. Built PR generation service that creates feature branches, commits Helm chart updates, and opens PR with detailed description including AI reasoning. Added link to approval dashboard in PR description. Integrated with GitHub Actions for automated Helm chart validation. Successfully tested with 15 PR generations across test repository.

summary: Develop operator approval dashboard with reasoning display
description: Build web dashboard for human operators to review AI-generated recommendations before GitOps deployment. Display tenant profile, release content summary, recommendation reasoning, and impact analysis. Support batch approval for multiple tenants.
resolution_details: Built React-based operator dashboard with three-panel layout (tenant list, recommendation details, approval controls). Implemented real-time WebSocket updates for recommendation status. Added recommendation editing capability for operators to override AI decision with justification. Built batch approval workflow for processing multiple tenants simultaneously. Dashboard includes risk indicators based on deployment complexity and tenant criticality. User tested with 5 operators achieving 94% approval rate on first review.

description: Implement metrics collection service aggregating data from Prometheus, Azure Monitor, and application logs. Build time-series database integration for historical trend analysis. Create metrics API for dashboard consumption.
resolution_details: Built metrics collector with Prometheus scraping for pod-level metrics and Azure Monitor integration for infrastructure metrics. Implemented InfluxDB storage for time-series data with 30-day retention. Created GraphQL API for flexible metric queries supporting aggregation by tenant, time range, and metric type. Collector processes 10k metric points per second with <200ms ingestion latency.

summary: Create health dashboard with anomaly detection
description: Build real-time dashboard displaying tenant health scores, resource utilization, error rates, and API latency. Implement ML-based anomaly detection for identifying abnormal tenant behavior patterns. Add configurable alerting thresholds.
resolution_details: Built dashboard using React with Chart.js for visualization and WebSocket for real-time updates. Implemented anomaly detection using isolation forest algorithm for multivariate outlier detection. Added customizable alert rules with severity levels (warning, critical) and notification channel configuration (Slack, PagerDuty, email). Dashboard supports drilling down to individual tenant metrics with 5-minute granularity. Anomaly detection achieved 87% precision with 12% false positive rate in staging validation.

summary: Implement global load balancer with geo-routing
description: Deploy Azure Traffic Manager for DNS-based geo-routing. Configure routing policies to direct tenant traffic to nearest regional cluster. Implement health checks and automatic failover to secondary regions on outage.
resolution_details: Configured Azure Traffic Manager with performance-based routing policy directing users to nearest region. Deployed application clusters in 5 regions (East US, West Europe, Southeast Asia, UK South, Canada Central). Implemented health probe endpoints checking application and database availability. Added automatic failover with <30 second detection and rerouting. Load testing showed average latency reduction of 45% for non-US tenants.

summary: Build tenant migration orchestrator for zero-downtime moves
description: Create migration orchestrator supporting live tenant migration between regions. Implement blue-green deployment pattern with traffic cutover after data synchronization. Add rollback capability for failed migrations.
resolution_details: Built migration orchestrator with five-phase workflow (validation, data replication, verification, cutover, cleanup). Implemented bidirectional database replication during migration window using Azure SQL sync groups. Added automated DNS record updates for post-cutover routing. Built verification stage comparing row counts and checksums between source and target. Added one-click rollback reverting DNS changes and stopping replication. Successfully migrated 5 pilot tenants with zero downtime and <10ms added latency post-migration.

summary: Build tenant state machine for lifecycle transitions
description: Implement state machine managing tenant lifecycle states (active, suspended, archived, deleted) with validated transitions. Build transition handlers for each state change ensuring data integrity and proper resource cleanup.
resolution_details: Built finite state machine using XState library with 7 states and 12 transition events. Implemented transition guards validating prerequisites (e.g., outstanding invoices before suspension). Added transition actions triggering side effects (notifications, audit logs, resource adjustments). Created state persistence layer storing current state and transition history in tenant metadata. State machine tested with 150+ transition scenarios including error cases and rollbacks.

summary: Implement data archival and deletion workflows
description: Build data archival service that exports complete tenant dataset to Azure Blob cold storage before deletion. Implement cascade deletion logic ensuring all tenant-related data is removed across all services. Add 90-day retention policy with automated cleanup.
resolution_details: Built archival service generating compressed JSON export of all tenant data including subscriptions, invoices, usage logs, and user data. Implemented parallel export across 8 data stores completing in <15 minutes for largest tenants. Added cascade deletion orchestrator coordinating deletions across 12 microservices with two-phase commit pattern. Configured lifecycle policy on blob storage auto-deleting archives after 90 days. Validated data completeness by comparing export checksums with source databases.
